name: Patient 21383
history: Forms close relationships with friends who experience significant stressors. A friend is dealing with academic pressures and parenting an autistic child.
intermediate_belief: I must take care of others to be valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am overwhelmed by my responsibilities.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of personal needs and prioritizing others' needs.
situation: Multiple friends are distressed at the same time, and the patient is involved in supporting them.
auto_thought: I can't handle all of this.
behavior: Overextends herself to support others, neglecting her own health and well-being.
